name: clearspeaker
description: Clean selected text and read it aloud with smooth xAI speech.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1

commands.name: speak-text
commands.title: Read Selection Aloud
commands.description: Cleans selected text, skips code and links, then reads it aloud with smooth xAI speech.

preferences.name: infisicalProjectId
preferences.title: Infisical Project ID
preferences.description: Optional. Used by the Infisical CLI to fetch XAI_API_KEY.

preferences.name: infisicalEnvironment
preferences.title: Infisical Environment
preferences.description: Environment to read from when using Infisical.

preferences.name: infisicalPath
preferences.title: Infisical Secret Path
preferences.description: Folder path that contains the xAI key in Infisical.

preferences.name: infisicalSecretName
preferences.title: Infisical Secret Name
preferences.description: Secret name for the xAI API key.

preferences.name: infisicalDomain
preferences.title: Infisical Domain
preferences.description: Optional. Use this for EU Cloud or a self-hosted Infisical instance.

preferences.name: infisicalToken
preferences.title: Infisical Service Token
preferences.description: Optional. Only needed if the CLI cannot use your local Infisical login.

preferences.name: xaiApiKey
preferences.title: Fallback xAI API Key
preferences.description: Optional. Used only if Infisical does not return XAI_API_KEY.

preferences.name: voiceId
preferences.title: Voice ID
preferences.description: xAI voice to use for speech.

title: ClearSpeaker
author: octavian_tocan
